subject: feat(ui): scale PageDots to match MiniCellGrid fixedHeight
body:
PageDots now accepts a size prop (px) for exact height matching with
the adjacent MiniCellGrid. ContextBar and LayoutTab both pass
FIXED_HEIGHTS.m (64px) so page dots and cell grid align visually.
Without the prop, PageDots falls back to the original responsive
Tailwind classes (44px mobile, 32px desktop).

Tags: ui, layout, contextbar
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: mobile-ux
Semver: minor
